Container.Name: reminders-app
Container.Overview: Single-user goal tracker with push reminders, calendar heatmap, streaks, and PWA install. Pairs with the reminders-postgres container.
Container.Requires: 1) The reminders Docker network must exist: `docker network create reminders`. 2) The image must be built locally first: `cd /mnt/user/appdata/reminders/app && docker build -t reminders-app:local .` 3) The reminders-postgres container should be running before this one starts.
Container.Description:
Accountability app — personal goal tracker with push reminders.
**Before adding:**
1. Clone the repo to appdata and build the image:
mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/reminders cd /mnt/user/appdata/reminders git clone https://github.com/YOU/reminders-app-web.git app cd app docker build -t reminders-app:local .
2. Create the shared Docker network if you haven't: `docker network create reminders` 3. Install the reminders-postgres template first.
**Required env vars** (see fields below): - DATABASE_URL — points at the postgres container by name - APP_PASSWORD — your login password - SESSION_SECRET — 32+ char random hex - VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY / VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY — generate with `npm run vapid:gen` - CRON_SECRET — bearer token for the User Scripts cron
**To update:** SSH in, `cd /mnt/user/appdata/reminders/app && git pull && docker build -t reminders-app:local .`, then click "Apply" or restart the container. Migrations run automatically on each start.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the app listens on. Point your reverse proxy / Cloudflare Tunnel at this.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Postgres connection string. Host is the postgres container name (reminders-postgres). User/password/db must match the postgres container's env vars.

Config.Name: APP_PASSWORD
Config.Description: The password you'll use to log into the app. Pick something strong.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: 32+ character random hex for cookie encryption. Generate with: docker run --rm node:20-alpine node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

Config.Name: VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID public key for Web Push. Generate with: docker run --rm -v $PWD:/work -w /work node:20-alpine sh -c 'npm install --no-save web-push && node scripts/gen-vapid.mjs'

Config.Name: VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID private key (paired with the public key above).

Config.Name: VAPID_SUBJECT
Config.Description: Contact email for the Web Push spec. Format: mailto:you@example.com

Config.Name: CRON_SECRET
Config.Description: Bearer token the Unraid User Scripts plugin sends when hitting /api/cron/*. Any random string.

Config.Name: APP_TIMEZONE
Config.Description: IANA timezone for date math. e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo.

Config.Name: DATABASE_SSL
Config.Description: Leave blank for local Docker Postgres. Set to 'require' for hosted Postgres with strict cert verification, or 'loose' to accept self-signed certs.
